subcodes.first_line: O Salman! If thou shouldst behold Javád, spread thou this Tablet before him, that he may inhale therefrom the fragrance of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا سلمان ان رایت الجواد فانشر هذا اللوح بین یدیه لیجد منه رایحه الله
subcodes.subjects: @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @meanings of letters and numbers; jafr (gematria), @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @business; financial; property matters
